opportunity.note: RB-only prior-season (2025) carry+tgt share pctl (features.json). Earned via backtest_composite_2025.py: only candidate with positive OOS market-orthogonal lift (+0.030 rho, 77% split-halves; partial 0.29 p=.016; FRAGILE n=50). Revert = W_OPP {} + W_TRAIT_POS {}.

matchup.note: matchup component = full-season schedule mean with playoff weeks tilted 1.5x; rmq/pmq kept separately for transparency

scheme_fit.note: season matchup pctl nudged by boom/scheme_fit.json season fit (coverage-specialist x 2026 opponent coverage tendency), capped +/-12 pctl; raw smq_pctl kept; revert = SF_SCALE 0

_meta.note: Forward-looking ADP-anchored nudge: 2026 p95 ceiling + portable traits + 2026 SEASON matchup (weeks 1-14 advance + 15-17 win, playoff-tilted). No backward boom rate. Bounded +/-CAP spots off market ADP.
